revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:神道用語一覧, en:Glossary of Shinto); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/19435566 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) --[[特別:Contributions/222.225.110.55|222.225.110.55]] 2008年4月30日 (水) 11:30 (UTC)『神座』のリンク先、おかしくないですか？ :ラーメン屋チェーンの説明になってますね……。[[特別:WhatLinksHere/神座|リンク元]]を見ると、ラーメン屋チェーンの[[神座]]（かむくら）を意図したものが2件、神道の神座（しんざ）を意図したものが1件でした（[[神道用語一覧]]と神道ポータルは除く）。どちらにしてもリンクは少ないので、移動してしまっても良いと思います。神道の方を「神座 (神道)」とするのも本末転倒ですし。（その前に神道の神座の説明を用意しておく必要はありますが。スタブレベルならすぐに書けますけど……） [[利用者:Nnh|nnh]] 2008年4月30日 (水) 16:06 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1198020005 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=List| {{WikiProject Glossaries}} {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|shinto=yes}} }} {{Broken anchors|links= * [[Traditional lighting equipment of Japan#Chōchin|Chōchin]] The anchor (#Chōchin) has been [[Special:Diff/1093730390|deleted by other users]] before. * [[Bushido#Eight virtues of ''Bushidō'' (as defined by Nitobe Inazō)|Kō]] * [[Rice#Cultural roles of rice|Kome]] The anchor (Cultural roles of rice) [[Special:Diff/1179961511|has been deleted]]. * [[Rice#Cultural roles of rice|O-kome]] The anchor (Cultural roles of rice) [[Special:Diff/1179961511|has been deleted]]. }} == Gogyo and Godai == Gogyo is an idea of Onmyōdō based on Chinese philosophy. On the other hand, Godai originated from Indian philosophy and was adopted into Buddhism. Neither is a Shinto term. In several authoritative Japanese encyclopedias, those terms are not associated with Shinto at all. Even if some shrines borrow the term, do not include it in the Shinto term. I cite the Asahi Shimbun's website, which is a compilation of several authoritative Japanese encyclopedias.[https://kotobank.jp/word/%E4%BA%94%E8%A1%8C-63672][https://kotobank.jp/word/%E4%BA%94%E5%A4%A7-65026]--[[User:Green cigarette|Green cigarette]] ([[User talk:Green cigarette|talk]]) 12:43, 7 February 2021 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Language templates == All of them are wrong! It should be: 
{{nihongo3|||}}
and we have: 
{{nihongo||, }}
The result is that English text gets tagged as Kanji, and transliterated Japanese is processed as English. Apart from causing ugly fonts in my browser, this is bad for blind users. It would be a nightmare to fix this all manually, so I might have to go and learn regex if no one else can fix it. [[User:SmallJarsWithGreenLabels|small jars]] [[User talk:SmallJarsWithGreenLabels|t]][[special:contributions/SmallJarsWithGreenLabels|c]] 19:12, 4 November 2022 (UTC) : Well I have done that now. It was simpler than I expected. Some of the entries might still be wrong. [[User:SmallJarsWithGreenLabels|small jars]] [[User talk:SmallJarsWithGreenLabels|t]][[special:contributions/SmallJarsWithGreenLabels|c]] 20:03, 4 November 2022 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/19435566 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) --[[特別:Contributions/222.225.110.55|222.225.110.55]] 2008年4月30日 (水) 11:30 (UTC)『神座』のリンク先、おかしくないですか？ :ラーメン屋チェーンの説明になってますね……。[[特別:WhatLinksHere/神座|リンク元]]を見ると、ラーメン屋チェーンの[[神座]]（かむくら）を意図したものが2件、神道の神座（しんざ）を意図したものが1件でした（[[神道用語一覧]]と神道ポータルは除く）。どちらにしてもリンクは少ないので、移動してしまっても良いと思います。神道の方を「神座 (神道)」とするのも本末転倒ですし。（その前に神道の神座の説明を用意しておく必要はありますが。スタブレベルならすぐに書けますけど……） [[User:Nnh|nnh]] 2008年4月30日 (水) 16:06 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1198020005 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=List| {{WikiProject Glossaries}} {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|shinto=yes}} }} {{Broken anchors|links= * [[Traditional lighting equipment of Japan#Chōchin|Chōchin]] The anchor (#Chōchin) has been [[Special:Diff/1093730390|deleted by other users]] before. * [[Bushido#Eight virtues of ''Bushidō'' (as defined by Nitobe Inazō)|Kō]] * [[Rice#Cultural roles of rice|Kome]] The anchor (Cultural roles of rice) [[Special:Diff/1179961511|has been deleted]]. * [[Rice#Cultural roles of rice|O-kome]] The anchor (Cultural roles of rice) [[Special:Diff/1179961511|has been deleted]]. }} == Gogyo and Godai == Gogyo is an idea of Onmyōdō based on Chinese philosophy. On the other hand, Godai originated from Indian philosophy and was adopted into Buddhism. Neither is a Shinto term. In several authoritative Japanese encyclopedias, those terms are not associated with Shinto at all. Even if some shrines borrow the term, do not include it in the Shinto term. I cite the Asahi Shimbun's website, which is a compilation of several authoritative Japanese encyclopedias.[https://kotobank.jp/word/%E4%BA%94%E8%A1%8C-63672][https://kotobank.jp/word/%E4%BA%94%E5%A4%A7-65026]--[[User:Green cigarette|Green cigarette]] ([[User talk:Green cigarette|talk]]) 12:43, 7 February 2021 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Language templates == All of them are wrong! It should be: 
{{nihongo3|||}}
and we have: 
{{nihongo||, }}
The result is that English text gets tagged as Kanji, and transliterated Japanese is processed as English. Apart from causing ugly fonts in my browser, this is bad for blind users. It would be a nightmare to fix this all manually, so I might have to go and learn regex if no one else can fix it. [[User:SmallJarsWithGreenLabels|small jars]] [[User talk:SmallJarsWithGreenLabels|t]][[special:contributions/SmallJarsWithGreenLabels|c]] 19:12, 4 November 2022 (UTC) : Well I have done that now. It was simpler than I expected. Some of the entries might still be wrong. [[User:SmallJarsWithGreenLabels|small jars]] [[User talk:SmallJarsWithGreenLabels|t]][[special:contributions/SmallJarsWithGreenLabels|c]] 20:03, 4 November 2022 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:wikipedia>Onel5969]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Glossary_of_Shinto here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/19435566 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) --[[特別:Contributions/222.225.110.55|222.225.110.55]] 2008年4月30日 (水) 11:30 (UTC)『神座』のリンク先、おかしくないですか？ :ラーメン屋チェーンの説明になってますね……。[[特別:WhatLinksHere/神座|リンク元]]を見ると、ラーメン屋チェーンの[[神座]]（かむくら）を意図したものが2件、神道の神座（しんざ）を意図したものが1件でした（[[神道用語一覧]]と神道ポータルは除く）。どちらにしてもリンクは少ないので、移動してしまっても良いと思います。神道の方を「神座 (神道)」とするのも本末転倒ですし。（その前に神道の神座の説明を用意しておく必要はありますが。スタブレベルならすぐに書けますけど……） [[User:Nnh|nnh]] 2008年4月30日 (水) 16:06 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1198020005 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=List| {{WikiProject Glossaries}} {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|shinto=yes}} }} {{Broken anchors|links= * [[Traditional lighting equipment of Japan#Chōchin|Chōchin]] The anchor (#Chōchin) has been [[Special:Diff/1093730390|deleted by other users]] before. * [[Bushido#Eight virtues of ''Bushidō'' (as defined by Nitobe Inazō)|Kō]] * [[Rice#Cultural roles of rice|Kome]] The anchor (Cultural roles of rice) [[Special:Diff/1179961511|has been deleted]]. * [[Rice#Cultural roles of rice|O-kome]] The anchor (Cultural roles of rice) [[Special:Diff/1179961511|has been deleted]]. }} == Gogyo and Godai == Gogyo is an idea of Onmyōdō based on Chinese philosophy. On the other hand, Godai originated from Indian philosophy and was adopted into Buddhism. Neither is a Shinto term. In several authoritative Japanese encyclopedias, those terms are not associated with Shinto at all. Even if some shrines borrow the term, do not include it in the Shinto term. I cite the Asahi Shimbun's website, which is a compilation of several authoritative Japanese encyclopedias.[https://kotobank.jp/word/%E4%BA%94%E8%A1%8C-63672][https://kotobank.jp/word/%E4%BA%94%E5%A4%A7-65026]--[[User:Green cigarette|Green cigarette]] ([[User talk:Green cigarette|talk]]) 12:43, 7 February 2021 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Language templates == All of them are wrong! It should be: 
{{nihongo3|||}}
and we have: 
{{nihongo||, }}
The result is that English text gets tagged as Kanji, and transliterated Japanese is processed as English. Apart from causing ugly fonts in my browser, this is bad for blind users. It would be a nightmare to fix this all manually, so I might have to go and learn regex if no one else can fix it. [[User:SmallJarsWithGreenLabels|small jars]] [[User talk:SmallJarsWithGreenLabels|t]][[special:contributions/SmallJarsWithGreenLabels|c]] 19:12, 4 November 2022 (UTC) : Well I have done that now. It was simpler than I expected. Some of the entries might still be wrong. [[User:SmallJarsWithGreenLabels|small jars]] [[User talk:SmallJarsWithGreenLabels|t]][[special:contributions/SmallJarsWithGreenLabels|c]] 20:03, 4 November 2022 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
